message:
fix(search): remove standalone BM25-only fallback hits from merged results

Remove the loop that injected BM25-only matches (those with no
multi-signal score) into the merged result set. These entries diluted
search relevance by surfacing prompts that matched on raw term
frequency alone without any prefix, fuzzy, or field-boosted signal,
leading to low-quality results appearing alongside strong matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
